name: Tadalafil Improves Haemodynamics and Arterial Stiffness but Not Flow-Mediated Dilation in Grade 1 Obesity. A Single-dose, Placebo-controlled Clinical Trial.
summary: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled acute trial in 80 participants with grade 1 obesity, testing a single tadalafil 20 mg dose against placebo on flow-mediated dilation, blood pressure, augmentation index, and brachial-ankle pulse wave velocity.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
